title: eupatorium rugosum f. villicaule
intro: Eupatorium rugosum f. villicaule, also known as hairy boneset or hairy thoroughwort, is a plant species in the sunflower family, native to eastern North America. The medicinal properties of Eupatorium rugosum f. villicaule lie in its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce inflammation, relieve headaches, and ease cold and flu symptoms. Eupatorium rugosum f. villicaule is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
